title: Sanger Sequencing Protocol
author: Igem Dusseldorf
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.8fghtjw

steps.title: Label 1
steps.instruction: Label 1.5 mL tubes with barcodes from sequencing company
. Add template (400 to 500 ng), primer and water (10 uL total volume, details below) %s %s uL per Reaction BarcodeTemplatePrimerTemplate#ERROR! 10 uM Primer2.5 Water#ERROR! Total Volume10.0

steps.title: Place tubes inside a small plastic...
steps.instruction: Place tubes inside a small plastic bag and drop off in sequecing company collection Box

steps.title: Results are usually ready to download...
steps.instruction: Results are usually ready to download from the sequecing companys website
